'''Freyrr''' was a [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] and second cousin of [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]]. During [[Lumpawaroo/Legends|Lumpawarrump's]] [[Hrrtayyk ceremony/Legends|Test of Ascension]], Freyrr informed Chewbacca that his friend [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] had been [[Capture of the Tampion|captured]] by the [[Yevetha]].
